annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Snap-mode window placement: commit/uncommit confirmations, the snap-restore resolution chain, resnap and snap-all batch placement, daemon-driven navigation (move/focus/swap/push/by-number/rotate/cycle/restore), and snap-mode float. Geometry application flows BACK to the compositor over org.plasmazones.WindowTracking (applyGeometryRequested, applyGeometriesBatch) — this interface carries no signals.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Confirm a single-zone snap from the compositor effect.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Confirm a multi-zone (zone-span) snap from the compositor effect.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Confirm an unsnap from the compositor effect.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Batch snap confirmations (rotate/resnap/snap-all completion).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Array of (windowId, zoneId, screenId, isRestore).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Record that a window class was USER-snapped (not auto-snapped) — feeds the snap-intent (user-snapped-class) learning.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Resolve a snap into the last used zone. Out-args carry the target geometry; shouldSnap=false means no placement applies.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Resolve a snap into the window's SnapToZone-rule-defined zone(s).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Resolve a snap into the first empty zone.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Run the full snap-restore resolution (placement-store restore + placement-rule / empty-zone / last-zone fallback chain) in one call.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Structural kind of the opening window (0=Unknown, 1=Normal, 2=Transient).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Resnap all windows from the previous layout to the current layout.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Resnap windows to their current zone assignments.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: When non-empty, only resnap windows on this screen.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Resnap windows from autotile to manual zones using the explicit autotile window order.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Calculate zone assignments for all provided windows (effect-local snap_all path applies the geometries).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Array of (windowId, targetZoneId, sourceZoneId, x, y, width, height).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Trigger snap-all-windows from a daemon shortcut (emits WindowTracking.snapAllWindowsRequested toward the effect).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Process a batch of resnap entries (JSON payload) and emit the resulting WindowTracking.applyGeometriesBatch.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Move the focused window to an adjacent zone.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: left, right, up, or down.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Focus a window in an adjacent zone.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Push the focused window to the first empty zone.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Screen to resolve layout/geometry for (empty = active layout).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Restore the focused window to its original size.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Swap the focused window with the window in an adjacent zone.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Snap the focused window to a zone by its number.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Zone number (1-9).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Rotate windows in the layout for a screen.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Screen to rotate on (empty = all screens).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Cycle focus between windows stacked in the same zone.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Snap a specific window to a specific zone by ID.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Swap two specific windows by ID.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Daemon-driven float toggle for snap-mode screens.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Set a window's floating state directly (snap mode).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Calculate unfloat restore geometry and zone IDs in a single call.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Struct: (found, zoneIds, screenName, x, y, width, height).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Unsnap a window for floating: saves its zone so unfloat can restore it.
